name: Priya Sharma
quote: We switched our entire studio to Quantum 6 months ago. The color retention is insane — clients come back and the tattoos still look fresh.

name: Aditya Verma
quote: The Gold Label range changed my work completely. Healing is so much better and clients are happier. Worth every rupee.

name: Kavya Reddy
quote: I was skeptical about switching brands, but Quantum's vegan formula actually makes my clients more comfortable. Business has grown 30% since we switched.

name: Sameer Khan
quote: Finally an ink that works with Indian skin tones. The colors pop beautifully on darker skin — something many inks fail at.

name: Alex Chen
quote: Quantum's quality and consistency are unmatched. The bulk program has streamlined our supplies and boosted our bottom line.
